#### `circleci workflow rerun <workflow-id> [flags]`

Rerun a workflow

| Flag            | Description            |
| --------------- | ---------------------- |
| `--from-failed` | Rerun only failed jobs |


**Arguments:**

`<workflow-id>` is the UUID of the workflow to rerun. Workflow IDs are
shown in the output of `circleci run get`.
